title: Clip Detail — Coordinator, Actions Panel, Freeze, Share, Stage, Cleanup
problem: The clip detail page must coordinate multiple independent concerns — playback, version selection, actions, and collaboration — without letting any one section own state that another needs. A band member should be able to select a version, hear exactly that version's cuts, vote on it, and trigger lifecycle actions (stage change, freeze, share, cleanup) all from one screen.
analysis:
**ClipDetailClient** is the coordinator. It owns `selectedVersionId` state (auto-selects latest version on mount; no deselect — clicking the active version keeps it selected). It derives `activeCuts` from the selected version's cutMarks and passes them to WaveformPlayer. It passes `activeVersionId` to CollaborationSection so votes are cast on the correct version. The Actions section is conditionally rendered: hidden when `!canEdit && !frozen` to prevent phantom whitespace for MEMBER-role users on non-frozen clips.

**ClipActionsClient** renders four action rows with bottom-sheet confirmations:
- **Stage** — tap to open stage picker sheet (Idea / Sketch / Developing / Demo Ready). Visible when canEdit && !frozen.
- **Freeze** — tap to open freeze picker (version selector). Editor+ role. On confirm: POST /api/clips/[clipId]/freeze with versionId. Shows error inline on failure.
- **Frozen status + Unfreeze** — shown when clip.frozen. Recorder only can unfreeze. Other roles see a non-tappable row with a lock icon.
- **Share link** — shown when frozen. Toggle public share: generatePublicToken / removePublicToken via PATCH /api/clips/[clipId]. Copy share link on tap once enabled. Copies /share/[token] URL to clipboard.
- **Clean up source audio** — shown when frozen && driveFileId exists. Opens cleanup sheet: shows what will be deleted (raw .aac) and what will remain (frozen render). Executes POST /api/clips/[clipId]/cleanup.
- **Processing** — shown when transcodeStatus === 'PENDING'. Non-tappable spinner row.

All action rows follow a consistent pattern: 56px touch targets, icon box on the left, label + subtitle, chevron or contextual right element.
successCriteria:
- Selecting a version updates WaveformPlayer to skip that version's cuts
- Clicking the active version keeps it selected (no deselect to null state)
- Actions section hidden when member role + non-frozen (no phantom whitespace)
- Stage picker opens as bottom sheet with 4 options; current stage highlighted
- Freeze picker shows version list; pre-selects latest version; on confirm: renders clip, updates UI
- Freeze error shown inline in freeze sheet; dismiss-able
- Frozen status row shows Unfreeze option for RECORDER, lock icon for non-Recorder
- Share toggle generates /share/[token] URL and copies to clipboard
- Copy feedback: button label changes to 'Copied!' for 2 seconds
- Cleanup sheet shows exactly what gets deleted and what remains before confirming
- Processing row visible while transcodeStatus is PENDING; disappears when DONE
- All bottom sheets have consistent Cancel button
- Edit cuts link visible when canEdit && !frozen — navigates to /edit page
implementation:
1. components/clips/ClipDetailClient.tsx: coordinator. Owns selectedVersionId (useState: auto-selects versions[last].id). Derives activeCuts from selectedVersion.cutMarks. Passes activeCuts to WaveformPlayer. Passes selectedVersionId to CollaborationSection as activeVersionId. Wraps Actions section in {(canEdit || frozen) && ...}. Contains version pill list as full-width tappable cards (rounded-2xl, blue active state). onClick: setSelectedVersionId(v.id) — no toggle. Edit link: Next.js <Link href={editHref}>.
2. components/clips/ClipActionsClient.tsx: actions panel. State: stage, isFrozen, driveFileId, publicToken, various sheet-open booleans, loading flags. ActionRow local component: renders <button> or <div> depending on onClick prop; consistent styling. Stage sheet: STAGE_ORDER.map → tappable rows with PATCH /api/clips/[clipId] {stage}. Freeze sheet: versions.map → tappable version selector + confirm button + freezeError display. Cleanup sheet: two info boxes (deleted / remains) + danger Button. Share: toggleShare() calls PATCH with generatePublicToken or removePublicToken; copyLink() copies URL, sets linkCopied for 2s feedback.
3. app/(auth)/bands/[bandId]/sessions/[sessionId]/clips/[clipId]/page.tsx: server component — loads clip, versions (ordered), stamps, votes, comments, membership via Prisma. Passes canEdit (role !== 'MEMBER' && !frozen), currentUserRole, editHref. Renders PageLayout + ClipDetailClient.

decisions.decision: No version deselect — clicking active version keeps it selected
decisions.rationale: Deselecting a version set selectedVersionId to null, which caused the player to show 'no cuts' (raw audio). This 'null = raw audio' state had no UI label and was visually identical to a version with no cuts. Confusing. Clicking the active version now keeps it selected — the player always reflects a known version.
decisions.recommendation: onChange={() => setSelectedVersionId(v.id)} — no toggle. To hear raw audio, select v1 (which has no cuts unless the clip was split).

decisions.rationale: MEMBER-role users on non-frozen clips have no available actions (they can't edit, can't freeze, can't share, can't clean up). Rendering an empty Actions section produces phantom whitespace between the Versions section and the Collaboration section. Hiding it entirely keeps the layout clean.
decisions.recommendation: Wrap the Actions <section> in {(canEdit || frozen) && ...}. Frozen clips always show the Actions section because all roles can see the frozen status, share link, and the Recorder can unfreeze.

decisions.decision: Freeze picker lets user select which version to freeze, not locked to latest
decisions.rationale: The band may have decided version 3 was better than version 4 (which went too far). Locking to 'latest version only' would force them to create a v5 that reverts v4 just to freeze it. The picker lets any Editor choose any version as the final render.
decisions.recommendation: Freeze sheet lists all versions in order; pre-selects the latest. User can tap any version row to select it before confirming. selectedVersionId state in ClipActionsClient is separate from the selectedVersionId in ClipDetailClient.

decisions.decision: All actions use bottom-sheet confirmation, not inline destructive buttons
decisions.rationale: Freeze, cleanup, and unfreeze are irreversible or hard-to-reverse operations. A confirmation sheet with clear consequence text (what gets deleted, what stays) gives the user one more mental checkpoint before committing. Bottom sheets also allow showing contextual info (e.g., the cleanup sheet's 'Will be deleted / Will remain' info boxes).
decisions.recommendation: Every action that mutates data opens a BottomSheet. Sheet contains consequence description + confirm Button (danger variant for destructive) + ghost Cancel button.

knownLimitations: Share link generation requires clip to be frozen — members cannot share a clip-in-progress
publicToken is stored in Postgres; if the tokens table is cleared, existing share links break
Unfreeze does not delete the rendered Drive file — it simply sets frozen=false. The rendered file remains in Drive until cleanup or clip delete.
userGuide: Open a clip from the session list. The waveform player at the top plays the clip with any cuts from the selected version applied. Tap any version card in the Versions section to switch — the player immediately reflects that version's cuts. Tap 'Edit cuts' to open the full-screen editor. In the Actions section: tap Stage to update the song's creative status; tap Freeze to lock the current edit and render a final file; after freezing, tap 'Enable public share' to generate a link anyone can use to listen. Tap 'Clean up source audio' to delete the raw recording from Drive once the clip is frozen and final.
